title: AWS Certified Security - Specialty
description: Scenario practice batch for Threat Detection and Monitoring.

questions.question: A security team wants managed threat detection for malicious API activity, unusual data access, and suspicious instance behavior across AWS accounts. Which service should they enable?
questions.shortExplanation: GuardDuty is AWS managed threat detection and is designed to surface malicious or anomalous behavior from AWS telemetry.
questions.fullExplanation: GuardDuty is AWS managed threat detection and is designed to surface malicious or anomalous behavior from AWS telemetry.
questions.explanation: GuardDuty is AWS managed threat detection and is designed to surface malicious or anomalous behavior from AWS telemetry.

questions.question: The team needs one place to aggregate security findings from GuardDuty, Inspector, and partner tools. Which service should be used?
questions.shortExplanation: Security Hub is the aggregation layer for findings and posture data from integrated security services.
questions.fullExplanation: Security Hub is the aggregation layer for findings and posture data from integrated security services.
questions.explanation: Security Hub is the aggregation layer for findings and posture data from integrated security services.

questions.question: An analyst wants to investigate which IP addresses communicated with an EC2 instance during a suspected intrusion. Which telemetry source is most helpful?
questions.shortExplanation: VPC Flow Logs are the direct network telemetry source for accepted and rejected traffic patterns in a VPC.
questions.fullExplanation: VPC Flow Logs are the direct network telemetry source for accepted and rejected traffic patterns in a VPC.
questions.explanation: VPC Flow Logs are the direct network telemetry source for accepted and rejected traffic patterns in a VPC.

questions.question: A company wants notifications whenever an IAM policy change occurs in a production account. Which foundational service must be enabled?
questions.shortExplanation: CloudTrail is required because it records IAM and other AWS API changes that can then trigger alerting.
questions.fullExplanation: CloudTrail is required because it records IAM and other AWS API changes that can then trigger alerting.
questions.explanation: CloudTrail is required because it records IAM and other AWS API changes that can then trigger alerting.

questions.question: A security team wants to discover sensitive data such as PII stored in S3 buckets. Which service best fits?
questions.shortExplanation: Macie is purpose-built for sensitive data discovery and classification in Amazon S3.
questions.fullExplanation: Macie is purpose-built for sensitive data discovery and classification in Amazon S3.
questions.explanation: Macie is purpose-built for sensitive data discovery and classification in Amazon S3.

questions.question: Which service helps analysts pivot through related events, users, IP addresses, and resources during an AWS security investigation?
questions.shortExplanation: Detective builds a graph of relationships that helps analysts investigate findings faster.
questions.fullExplanation: Detective builds a graph of relationships that helps analysts investigate findings faster.
questions.explanation: Detective builds a graph of relationships that helps analysts investigate findings faster.

questions.question: A multi-account environment needs centralized security visibility with findings rolled up into a delegated admin account. Which pattern is best?
answers: Enable every service only in the management account
Use organization-wide delegated administration for security tooling
Create separate root users in each account
questions.shortExplanation: Delegated administration gives a central security account visibility while preserving account boundaries.
questions.fullExplanation: Delegated administration gives a central security account visibility while preserving account boundaries.
questions.explanation: Delegated administration gives a central security account visibility while preserving account boundaries.

questions.question: A team receives too many low-value alerts and important findings are missed. What process improvement has the highest impact?
answers: Tune detections and add severity-based triage
questions.shortExplanation: Better tuning and severity-based triage improve analyst focus and reduce alert fatigue.
questions.fullExplanation: Better tuning and severity-based triage improve analyst focus and reduce alert fatigue.
questions.explanation: Better tuning and severity-based triage improve analyst focus and reduce alert fatigue.

questions.question: An architect wants to know whenever a security group allows unrestricted SSH access. Which service can continuously evaluate that configuration?
questions.shortExplanation: AWS Config can continuously evaluate resources against rules such as unrestricted SSH access.
questions.fullExplanation: AWS Config can continuously evaluate resources against rules such as unrestricted SSH access.
questions.explanation: AWS Config can continuously evaluate resources against rules such as unrestricted SSH access.

questions.question: The team wants automated notification when a high-severity GuardDuty finding appears. What is a common serverless pattern?
questions.shortExplanation: EventBridge is commonly used to route findings to automated responders or notification targets.
questions.fullExplanation: EventBridge is commonly used to route findings to automated responders or notification targets.
questions.explanation: EventBridge is commonly used to route findings to automated responders or notification targets.

questions.question: A company centralizes logs but analysts still cannot quickly tell which team owns an affected resource. What should be added?
answers: Tag-based enrichment in the alert pipeline
questions.shortExplanation: Enriching alerts with ownership context reduces triage time and improves response routing.
questions.fullExplanation: Enriching alerts with ownership context reduces triage time and improves response routing.
questions.explanation: Enriching alerts with ownership context reduces triage time and improves response routing.

questions.question: A security lead wants both raw telemetry and interpreted threat findings. Which combination best fits?
questions.shortExplanation: CloudTrail supplies the raw API trail while GuardDuty turns AWS telemetry into threat detections.
questions.fullExplanation: CloudTrail supplies the raw API trail while GuardDuty turns AWS telemetry into threat detections.
questions.explanation: CloudTrail supplies the raw API trail while GuardDuty turns AWS telemetry into threat detections.

questions.question: An organization wants one security team to see findings from every member account without logging into each account manually. What is the best design?
answers: Use a centralized delegated admin account for the services
Create a bastion host in every account
questions.shortExplanation: Central delegated administration is the scalable pattern for shared visibility across AWS Organizations.
questions.fullExplanation: Central delegated administration is the scalable pattern for shared visibility across AWS Organizations.
questions.explanation: Central delegated administration is the scalable pattern for shared visibility across AWS Organizations.

questions.question: A SOC notices many medium-severity alerts from expected penetration tests. What is the best next step?
answers: Tune or suppress expected findings with documented process
Reduce VPC Flow Logs retention to one day
questions.shortExplanation: Expected activity should be tuned carefully to preserve signal quality without removing important coverage.
questions.fullExplanation: Expected activity should be tuned carefully to preserve signal quality without removing important coverage.
questions.explanation: Expected activity should be tuned carefully to preserve signal quality without removing important coverage.

questions.question: A new monitoring architecture only logs API calls but ignores data access and network telemetry. What is the biggest weakness?
answers: Coverage gaps will miss whole classes of suspicious behavior
questions.shortExplanation: Detection quality suffers when visibility excludes network flows and sensitive data access patterns.
questions.fullExplanation: Detection quality suffers when visibility excludes network flows and sensitive data access patterns.
questions.explanation: Detection quality suffers when visibility excludes network flows and sensitive data access patterns.
